case_title: POON, JANE vs. VENEGAS, FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT VENEGAS, FRANCISCO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: KENNEDY, SYLVIA SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR VENEGAS, FRANCISCO

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF WHO WAS ON TELEPHONE STANDBY AND WAS REPRESENTED BY HER ATTORNEY OF RECORD, MICHAEL ROSSOFF. MATTHEW ROSEN SWORN AS INTERPRETER OF SPANISH TO ENGLISH EXPLAINED THE TERMS OF THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT FRANCISCO VENEGAS WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY SYLVIA KENNEDY WHO FILED A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY ON 7/16/96. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT READ INTO THE COURT RECORD AND REPORTED BY LORETTA NAJARA. SEE CLERK NOTES FOR FURTHER DETAILS OF THE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.

TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, CASE SETTLED BY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VENEGAS, FRANCISCO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2745 MISSION STREET #6 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS OR APPEALS. SEC. DEP. TO BE RETURNED TO DEFT. PER CC 1950.5. MUTUAL RELEASE UNDER CIVIL CODE 1542. JUDGMENT TO BE VACATED, PROVIDED DEFENDANT FRANCISCO VENEGAS VACATES ON OR BEFORE 9/30/96 5:00 P.M. SEE JUDMENT AT LENGTH
